strengths: 15+ years fullstack experience with TypeScript/Node.js and React (Optilyz, RIDE, re:cinq)
Active AI-agent work at re:cinq including MCP code generators and agentic frameworks
Strong testing/craftsmanship background: TDD, pairing, CI/CD, Selenium course author, custom test runner (Trial)
concerns: No explicit Nest.js experience mentioned in the resume
Vitest/Jest/Playwright not named specifically despite heavy testing emphasis
PostgreSQL not listed; relational DB exposure limited to MySQL/SQL with MongoDB as primary

key_factors.factor: Missing Nest.js and unnamed Vitest/Playwright experience

response.justification: Candidate exceeds the 6+ year fullstack bar with a long TS/Node + React track record (Optilyz used TypeScript, AWS CDK, React, MongoDB) and current AI-agent infrastructure work at re:cinq including MCP code generators — a direct match for the AI-agent requirement. Cloud/containerization is covered (AWS CDK, Docker, Kubernetes via GISCollective), Java appears for robotic-arm work at Altom, and CS degree is present. Gaps: Nest.js is not on the resume, the named test frameworks (Vitest/Jest/Playwright) are not cited even though testing culture is strong, and PostgreSQL is absent though MongoDB and MySQL are listed. The framework gaps are easily bridged given the depth of foundational skills.
